(404)PETITIONER APPEARED WITHOUT COUNSEL. COUNSEL WILL FILE WITHDRAWAL. RESPONDENT APPEARED IN PROPRIA PERSONA. THE COURT ADOPTED THE RECOMMENDATIONS OF THE EVALUAT
ION WITH SOME REVISIONS. VISITATION SHALL OCCUR FROM WEDNESDAY AFTER SCHOOL UNTIL THURSDAY START OF SCHOOL. IF MONDAY IS A HOLIDAY THEN MOTHER'S
FTER SCHOOL FRIDAY TO START OF SCHOOL ON TUESDAY. PETITIONER SHALL HAVE MEMORIAL DAY IN THE EVEN YEARS. RESPONDENT SHALL HAVE LABOR DAY IN THE EVEN
S FIRST WEEK OF CHRISTMAS VACATION AND RESPONDENT GETS THE SECOND. RESPONDENT GETS MOTHER'S DAY WEEKEND AND PETITIONER GETS FATHER'S DAY WEEKEND.
